description: Perform a month-end bank reconciliation using /home/ga/Documents/november_reconciliation.xlsx. In the 'Ledger' sheet, add a 'Status' column to identify transactions as 'Cleared' or 'Outstanding' based on their presence in the 'Bank_Statement' sheet. In the 'Bank_Statement' sheet, add a 'Ledger_Match' column to identify transactions as 'Recorded' or 'Unrecorded' based on their presence in the 'Ledger' sheet. Create a new sheet named 'Recon_Summary' containing a summary table with the following labeled values: Unadjusted Ledger Balance, Unadjusted Bank Balance, Total Outstanding Items, Unrecorded Bank Items, Adjusted Ledger Balance, Adjusted Bank Balance, and Variance. Apply Currency or Accounting formatting to the summary values and Bold the Variance row. Save the spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/november_reconciliation.xlsx.
